form.formComment: Comes off a 34 day let-up. Last start 5th of 7 at this track on March 6 over 1207m, 5.5 len behind Eye Candy Warrior with 56kg at $4.30. Before that 3rd of 8 at this track on February 27 over 1207m, 5 len behind Joyous Song carrying 54.5kg at $7.50. Didn?t fire last start but is capable of better.

form.formComment: Having third race start. At debut, in a small field at Parx on March 16 over 1207m, 14 len behind Peacefulezfeeling with 56.5kg at $12.20. Last start set the pace for much of the race 2nd in a small field at this track on March 25 over 1207m, 0.1 len behind Vino Amore with 56kg at $2.10. Well-placed and should prove hard to beat.

form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after three months 3rd in a small field at Parx on March 16 over 1207m, 10 len behind Peacefulezfeeling with 56.5kg at $5.80. Previously second-up got back early 3rd in a small field at Parx on November 5 over 1308m, 2.25 len behind Didn't It Rain with 55.5kg at $11. Sure to run well.

form.formComment: Lining up for just third start. When well in the market at debut, ran last in a small field at this track on March 6 over 1207m, 3 len behind Dale carrying 56kg at $2.90. Second-up ran on from midfield; 2nd of 8 at this track on March 27 over 1106m, 13 len behind Tiz Ziffy carrying 56kg at $14. Well-placed, can figure in the finish.
